commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in Telegram Guest Mode handling, including `guest_message` allowed updates, isolated guest sessions, `answerGuestQuery` delivery, Telegram config/schema/docs updates, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +664, Tests +853, Docs +11, Generated 0. Total +1528 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocker: source inspection traces `bot-guest.ts` default-agent selection into `bot-message-context.ts` binding skipping. A focused regression test can configure a Telegram account/channel binding and assert the guest payload uses that bound agent/session.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is one concrete mechanical blocker: guest turns need to preserve existing Telegram account/channel route bindings while retaining isolated guest sessions.
